summary: EcoRide full-stack testing complete. Backend: 17/17 pytest tests passed (auth, rides, sustainability, chats, websocket broadcast). Frontend: all critical flows green on mobile viewport (390x844) — login, dashboard sustainability header, search list, ride details, booking, chat send, chat list, profile, logout, and signup. 0 console errors during automation.

issues: Expo dev server prints 'shadow* style props deprecated. Use boxShadow' warnings — non-blocking but should migrate StyleSheet shadow props to boxShadow for RN 0.76+ web compatibility

react_native_issues.issue: Expo doctor warns mismatched expected versions: expo-linear-gradient, expo-location, react-native-maps, react-native-svg. App still works on web but may break on native build. Consider running `npx expo install --fix`.

action_items: (Optional) Migrate StyleSheet shadow* props to boxShadow to silence RN-Web deprecation warnings
(Optional) Run `npx expo install --fix` to align expo-linear-gradient/location, react-native-maps, react-native-svg with Expo SDK expected versions
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 637 lines — borderline; consider splitting into routers (auth, rides, chats, ws) once it grows >700 lines.
JWT secret correctly read from env; bcrypt used with proper $2b$ salts; emails normalized via .lower().strip() — all good.
MongoDB _id correctly excluded everywhere via projection {'_id': 0}.
WebSocket /api/ws/chat/{chat_id} performs no auth on connection — anyone with chat_id can subscribe to broadcasts. Acceptable for MVP but flag as a future hardening item (require token query param).
seed_data_creation: No new seed data required. Verified that backend on-startup seeds 4 users (sarah/mike/alex/priya), 1 admin, and 4 open rides. Test created TEST_user_<ts>@ecoride.app and a TEST signup user during the run; bookings & messages tagged with TEST_ prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_ecoride.py -v` for full backend regression. Frontend uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (note the EXPO_PUBLIC_ prefix). Login screen is pre-populated with sarah.driver creds; for booking flows, log in as mike.rider@ecoride.app since the first seed ride is owned by sarah and her own ride shows disabled 'Your ride' button (by design). Tabs use role=tab; query via `[role="tab"]` with hasText label. Web shows 'Interactive Map' placeholder by design (react-native-maps is native-only).
rca_of_issue: N/A — no failing scenarios found. The single initial pytest failure was a test-side bug (expected case-preserved email; backend correctly lowercases on register). Test was corrected and re-run to 17/17 pass.
